name: Tagine of Okra & Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash, trim, and tail the okra.
2. String the okra together with thread into a necklace.
3. Over high heat, cook the tomatoes with parsley, paprika, garlic, salt, and vegetable oil. Mash the tomatoes as they cook.
4. After 10 minutes, lower the heat to medium. Add the okra and poach it in the sauce. Stir occasionally.
5. Once the okra is tender, remove and keep warm.
6. Reduce the tomatoes until all the water has evaporated and the oil is released from the pan. Fry the tomatoes in this released oil, stirring continuously.
7. Gently pull out the thread from the necklace. Place the okra in a serving dish.
8. Pour the sauce over the top. Serve hot or lukewarm.
